surfaceMix.note: 19 comments logged this period — 3x profile view multiplier active
4 posts · 1,915 impressions · vibe coding post top performer at 545 impressions

contentEngagement.detail: Vibe coding with Claude / Anthropic · 19 engagements
PLEX — Power Load EXaminer tool announcement · 12 engagements

insights.title: Post impressions +62.2% WoW — second consecutive week of double-digit growth.
insights.body: 1,915 impressions this week vs. 1,453 last week (est.). Two consecutive weeks of strong growth signal algorithmic momentum. The vibe coding / Anthropic post (545 impressions, 19 engagements) outperformed the PLEX post (346 impressions, 12 engagements) this cycle. Authentic behind-the-scenes content is matching or exceeding structured tool announcements. Post cadence of 4 posts this week is above LinkedIn's recommended once-per-week threshold — maintain but watch engagement rate per post.

insights.title: Profile viewers dipped to 557 (−14.7% vs prior 7d) despite impression surge.
insights.body: This divergence — impressions up, profile views down — is normal when content reaches outside your core network. New audiences engage with posts without clicking through to profiles. Not a concern. Watch whether the Cairo Executive Director, Bancorp, or BridgeCable anonymous views convert to named viewers next week. The 72-mutual Ivan Schwartz view (AtlasIED) from 3d ago is the highest-quality inbound this snapshot.

insights.title: 18 recruiter views banner holds — KPG99 INC named, Anthropic carry-over.
insights.body: KPG99 INC remains named on the recruiter banner. Anthropic from prior week is no longer in the visible viewer list but was confirmed last snapshot. 17+ remain anonymous. Profile continues to surface in Recruiter Lite searches. Stable banner count across two consecutive weeks suggests consistent indexing in recruiter search results. No action needed — maintain keyword density in headline and About section.

insights.title: Hunter Petrie, RCDD — credentialed peer view at 2d ago.
insights.body: 1st-degree RCDD with Assistant Director title in ICT/Telecommunications infrastructure. Campus network and fiber engineering background. This is a high-signal peer view — RCDDs visiting RCDDs often represent collaboration interest, referral network activity, or competitive benchmarking. No action required but worth noting if a connection request arrives.

insights.title: Vibe coding post outperformed PLEX — authenticity is matching utility content.
insights.body: 545 impressions and 19 engagements for a casual 'rainy day vibe coding with Claude' post vs. 346 impressions and 12 engagements for the structured PLEX tool announcement. This suggests your audience responds to personality + tool combination more than structured announcements alone. Recommendation: combine both formats — lead with a relatable moment, then reveal the tool or output. Test this hybrid format on the next post.

insights.title: Premium decision point: ~July 19. Signal quality remains strong.
insights.body: Ivan Schwartz (AtlasIED, 72 mutuals), Hunter Petrie RCDD (1st degree), Nate Lum RCDD (32 mutuals), KPG99 INC recruiter named — all visible this snapshot. Two consecutive weeks of 60%+ impression growth and consistent named recruiter visibility at $30/mo is tracking as justified. Key variable: does Anthropic, AtlasIED, or another named viewer initiate contact before July? If yes, Premium has paid for itself. If no contact by late June, reassess.
